entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: Solanum lycopersicum L., the crop studied for yield and yield related traits

entities.name: CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to study the relationship between thirteen yield and yield related traits

entities.name: PATH COEFFICIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to reveal direct and indirect effects of traits on fruit yield

entities.name: FRUIT YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of fruit produced per individual tomato plant

entities.name: AVERAGE FRUIT WEIGHT
entities.description: The mean weight of the fruits produced by the plant

entities.name: YIELD PER HECTARE
entities.description: The total fruit production measured per hectare of land

entities.name: BETA CAROTENE
entities.description: A nutritional pigment found in tomato fruits

entities.name: LYCOPENE
entities.description: A nutritional pigment found in tomato fruits

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the tomato plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of main branches emerging from the tomato plant

entities.name: DAYS TO FRUIT SET
entities.description: The duration from flowering to the formation of fruit

entities.name: NUMBER OF FRUITS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of fruits produced by a single plant

entities.name: ASCORBIC ACID
entities.description: The vitamin C content within the tomato fruit

entities.name: TSS
entities.description: Total Soluble Solids, a measure of the sugar content and quality of the fruit

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season during which the study was conducted in 2017-18

entities.name: CROP YIELD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The objective of increasing the overall productivity of the tomato crop through selection

relationships.target: NUMBER OF PRIMARY BRANCHES PER PLANT
